name: agent-project-control-tower-dashboard
description: Astro dashboard shell for Agent Project Control Tower. Reads the static generated/index.json from the repo root.

scripts.prebuild: if [ "$SKIP_DASHBOARD_PREBUILD" = "1" ]; then echo 'prebuild: SKIP_DASHBOARD_PREBUILD=1, using existing generated/index.json'; else cd ../.. && python scripts/tower.py validate --source public-data && python scripts/tower.py build --source public-data --no-embedded; fi
